transcription:
-snapshot is of the state, which is just a
history of all events

-A snapshot is correct when it observes
it has all such that if an event is in the
snapshot, then all events that happen before
it should be too.

A snapshot satisfying this property is called
a consistent global snapshot

Chandy-Lamport algorithm

items.text: snapshot is of the state, which is just a history of all events
A snapshot is correct when it observes it has all such that if an event is in the snapshot, then all events that happen before it should be too.

blocks.text: A snapshot satisfying this property is called a consistent global snapshot
